text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 289 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_MOPP_3M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy - days in 3-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a 3-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using a 
mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_DAYS_MOPP_3M 

TYPE:
